[[[Wikipedia:Citing sources |''citation needed'']]] ---- Use this tag for information that needs citations to make it complete. Do not use this tag in order to label text which appears doubtful or false, '''especially''' in the case of [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biographies of living people]] (see [[Wikipedia:Three-revert_rule#Reverting_potentially_libellous_material|this section of WP:3RR]] as well). This tag is for Otherwise please use {{tl|verify source}}. Regarding the unsourced or poorly sourced information: # if it is '''not doubtful''', you may use {{tl|fact}} or {{tl|citequote}} tag to ask for better citation in order to make the article complete. # if it is '''doubtful''' but '''not too harmful''' to the whole article, you may use {{tl|verify source}} tag to ask for source verification.
# If it is '''doubtful''' and '''(quite) highly harmful''', you may move it to the talk page and ask for a source.
# If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', you may remove it directly without the need of moving it to the talk page first. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AFact What links here]. This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content. ==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] *''{{tl|Cite}} (deprecated)'' *{{tl|Citequote}}, tagging a request for citation, used for information that needs citations to make it complete, but not for seemingly doubtful or false texts *{{tl|Request quote}}, tagging a request for quoting inaccessible source, used for requesting a direct quote from the cited source for verification *{{tl|Verify source}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{tl|Verify credibility}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{tl|Citecheck}}, popping up a box saying an article or section may have inappropriate or misinterpreted citations *{{tl|Not verified}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has not been verified and may not be reliable *{{tl|Unreferenced}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has no citation or reference for its information [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[als:Vorlage:Beleg]] [[et:Mall:Lisa viide]] [[el:Πρότυπο:Εκκρεμεί παραπομπή]] [[es:Plantilla:Añadir referencias]] [[fa:نیاز به ذکر منبع]] [[fr:Modèle:Citation nécessaire]] [[it:Template:Citazione necessaria]] [[ja:Template:要出典]] [[lv:Template:Nepieciešama atsauce]] [[no:Mal:Trenger referanse]] [[pt:Predefinição:Carece de fontes]] [[ro:Format:Necesită citare]] [[ru:Шаблон:Нет источника]] [[sr:Шаблон:Чињеница]] [[sv:Mall:Källa behövs]] [[te:Template:మూలాలు అవసరం]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Cần chú thích]] [[zh:Template:Fact]] [[Category:Articles needing sources]]

This is '''especially''' true in the case of [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biographies of living people]] (see [[Wikipedia:Three-revert_rule#Reverting_potentially_libellous_material|this section of WP:3RR]] as well). Otherwise please use {{tl|verify source}}. Regarding the unsourced or poorly sourced information: # if it is likely true, but '''needs specificity,''' you may use {{tl|specify}} # if it is '''not doubtful''', you may use {{tl|fact}} or {{tl|citequote}} tag to ask for better citation in order to make the article complete. # if it is '''doubtful''' but '''not too harmful''' to the whole article, you may use {{tl|verify source}} tag to ask for source verification.
# If it is '''doubtful''' and '''(quite) highly harmful''', you may move it to the talk page and ask for a source.
# If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', you may remove it directly without the need of moving it to the talk page first. [[[Wikipedia:Citing sources|''citation needed'']]]{{#if: {{NAMESPACE}} | | [[Category:Articles needing sources]] }} ---- Enter this tag in the body of an article as a request for other editors to find citations: # to label a passage which is incomplete without a cited source of information # to label a quotation which lacks a citation, as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]. '''Do not use this tag in order to label text which appears doubtful or false''', especially in the case of [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biographies of living people]] (see [[Wikipedia:Three-revert_rule#Reverting_potentially_libellous_material|this section of WP:3RR]] as well). For dealing with dubious information, please use {{[[Template:verify source|verify source]]}}. See also [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Text that is, or is likely to be, disputed]]. Regarding the unsourced or poorly sourced information: # if it is likely true, but '''needs specificity,''' you may use {{[[Template:specify|specify]]}} # if it is '''not doubtful''', you may use {{[[Template:fact|fact]]}} or {{[[Template:citequote|citequote]]}} tag to ask for better citation in order to make the article complete. # if it is '''doubtful''' but '''not too harmful''' to the whole article, you may use {{[[Template:verify source|verify source]]}} tag to ask for source verification.
# If it is '''doubtful''' and '''(quite) highly harmful''', you may move it to the talk page and ask for a source.
# If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', you may remove it directly without the need of moving it to the talk page first. To find all pages that use this template, see [[Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:Fact|What links here]]. For articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles needing sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content. ==Useful redirects== * revision.comment: Prevent substitution, per talk page. {{{name}}} parameter is only for meta purposes and need not be included in the subst-to-self magic.
Documentation allows for a "reason" parameter, although it's unused in the template. Account for it in subst-to-self logic.
Nominated for merging; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Citation needed]]

|class=Template-Fact

revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2012 August 28#Template:Citation_needed]] closed as no consensus
Show {{{reason}}} in tooltip, if provided. Discussed on talk page.

Changed protection level of Template:Citation needed: Enable access by template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))

Changed protection level of Template:Citation needed: listed on [[WP:CASC]], and probably needs to stay at full prot; cf. https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Requests_for_page_protection&diff=601804535&oldid=601804352 ([Edit=Allow only ad
remove N parameter, not needed now

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Citation needed]]": <200 transclusions, lowering protection ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Citation needed]]": my mistake, meant to be on [[Template:Citation required]] ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))

revision.comment: clarifying the application of this template
revision.text:
[[[Wikipedia:Citing sources |''citation needed'']]] ---- Enter this tag in the body of an article as a request for other editors to find citations: # to label a passage which is incomplete without a cited source of information # to label a quotation lacks a citation, as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]. '''Do not use this tag in order to label text which appears doubtful or false''' For dealing with dubious information, see [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Text that is, or is likely to be, disputed]]. This is '''especially''' true in the case of [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biographies of living people]] (see [[Wikipedia:Three-revert_rule#Reverting_potentially_libellous_material|this section of WP:3RR]] as well). Otherwise please use {{tl|verify source}}. Regarding the unsourced or poorly sourced information: # if it is likely true, but '''needs specificity,''' you may use {{tl|specify}} # if it is '''not doubtful''', you may use {{tl|fact}} or {{tl|citequote}} tag to ask for better citation in order to make the article complete. # if it is '''doubtful''' but '''not too harmful''' to the whole article, you may use {{tl|verify source}} tag to ask for source verification.
# If it is '''doubtful''' and '''(quite) highly harmful''', you may move it to the talk page and ask for a source.
# If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', you may remove it directly without the need of moving it to the talk page first. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AFact What links here]. For articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles needing sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content. ==Useful redirects== * {{tl|cn}} * {{tl|Cite needed}} * {{tl|Cite-needed}} * {{tl|Citeneeded}} ==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] *''{{tl|Cite}} (deprecated)'' *{{tl|Citequote}}, tagging a request for citation, used for quotaions that needs citations to make it complete, but not for seemingly doubtful or false texts *{{tl|Request quote}}, tagging a request for quoting inaccessible source, used for requesting a direct quote from the cited source for verification *{{tl|Verify source}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{tl|Verify credibility}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{tl|Citecheck}}, popping up a box saying an article or section may have inappropriate or misinterpreted citations *{{tl|Not verified}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has not been verified and may not be reliable *{{tl|Unreferenced}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has no citation or reference for its information [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[als:Vorlage:Beleg]] [[et:Mall:Lisa viide]] [[el:Πρότυπο:Εκκρεμεί παραπομπή]] [[es:Plantilla:Añadir referencias]] [[fa:نیاز به ذکر منبع]] [[fr:Modèle:Citation nécessaire]] [[he:תבנית:מקור]] [[it:Template:Citazione necessaria]] [[ja:Template:要出典]] [[lv:Template:Nepieciešama atsauce]] [[nn:mal:kjelde manglar]] [[no:Mal:Trenger referanse]] [[pt:Predefinição:Carece de fontes]] [[ro:Format:Necesită citare]] [[ru:Шаблон:Нет источника]] [[sr:Шаблон:Чињеница]] [[sv:Mall:Källa behövs]] [[te:Template:మూలాలు అవసరం]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Cần chú thích]] [[zh:Template:Fact]] [[Category:Articles needing sources]]

revision.comment: clarifying the application of this template
revision.text:
[[[Wikipedia:Citing sources |''citation needed'']]] ---- Enter this tag in the body of an article as a request for other editors to find citations: # to label a passage which is incomplete without a cited source of information # to label a quotation which lacks a citation, as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]. '''Do not use this tag in order to label text which appears doubtful or false''' For dealing with dubious information, see [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Text that is, or is likely to be, disputed]]. This is '''especially''' true in the case of [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biographies of living people]] (see [[Wikipedia:Three-revert_rule#Reverting_potentially_libellous_material|this section of WP:3RR]] as well). Otherwise please use {{tl|verify source}}. Regarding the unsourced or poorly sourced information: # if it is likely true, but '''needs specificity,''' you may use {{tl|specify}} # if it is '''not doubtful''', you may use {{tl|fact}} or {{tl|citequote}} tag to ask for better citation in order to make the article complete. # if it is '''doubtful''' but '''not too harmful''' to the whole article, you may use {{tl|verify source}} tag to ask for source verification.
# If it is '''doubtful''' and '''(quite) highly harmful''', you may move it to the talk page and ask for a source.
# If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', you may remove it directly without the need of moving it to the talk page first. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AFact What links here]. For articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles needing sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content. ==Useful redirects== * {{tl|cn}} * {{tl|Cite needed}} * {{tl|Cite-needed}} * {{tl|Citeneeded}} ==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] *''{{tl|Cite}} (deprecated)'' *{{tl|Citequote}}, tagging a request for citation, used for quotaions that needs citations to make it complete, but not for seemingly doubtful or false texts *{{tl|Request quote}}, tagging a request for quoting inaccessible source, used for requesting a direct quote from the cited source for verification *{{tl|Verify source}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{tl|Verify credibility}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{tl|Citecheck}}, popping up a box saying an article or section may have inappropriate or misinterpreted citations *{{tl|Not verified}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has not been verified and may not be reliable *{{tl|Unreferenced}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has no citation or reference for its information [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[als:Vorlage:Beleg]] [[et:Mall:Lisa viide]] [[el:Πρότυπο:Εκκρεμεί παραπομπή]] [[es:Plantilla:Añadir referencias]] [[fa:نیاز به ذکر منبع]] [[fr:Modèle:Citation nécessaire]] [[he:תבנית:מקור]] [[it:Template:Citazione necessaria]] [[ja:Template:要出典]] [[lv:Template:Nepieciešama atsauce]] [[nn:mal:kjelde manglar]] [[no:Mal:Trenger referanse]] [[pt:Predefinição:Carece de fontes]] [[ro:Format:Necesită citare]] [[ru:Шаблон:Нет источника]] [[sr:Шаблон:Чињеница]] [[sv:Mall:Källa behövs]] [[te:Template:మూలాలు అవసరం]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Cần chú thích]] [[zh:Template:Fact]] [[Category:Articles needing sources]]

[[[Wikipedia:Citing sources |''citation needed'']]] ---- Enter this tag in the body of an article as a request for other editors to find citations: # to label a passage which is incomplete without a cited source of information # to label a quotation which lacks a citation, as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]. '''Do not use this tag in order to label text which appears doubtful or false''' For dealing with dubious information, see [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Text that is, or is likely to be, disputed]]. This is '''especially''' true in the case of [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biographies of living people]] (see [[Wikipedia:Three-revert_rule#Reverting_potentially_libellous_material|this section of WP:3RR]] as well). Otherwise please use {{tl|verify source}}. Regarding the unsourced or poorly sourced information: # if it is likely true, but '''needs specificity,''' you may use {{tl|specify}} # if it is '''not doubtful''', you may use {{tl|fact}} or {{tl|citequote}} tag to ask for better citation in order to make the article complete. # if it is '''doubtful''' but '''not too harmful''' to the whole article, you may use {{tl|verify source}} tag to ask for source verification.
# If it is '''doubtful''' and '''(quite) highly harmful''', you may move it to the talk page and ask for a source.
# If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', you may remove it directly without the need of moving it to the talk page first. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AFact What links here]. For articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles needing sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content. ==Useful redirects== * direct quote from the cited source for verification *{{tl|Verify source}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{tl|Verify credibility}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{tl|Betterfact}}, tagging information which is cited when a more [[WP:RS|reliable source]] is desired *{{tl|Citecheck}}, popping up a box saying an article or section may have inappropriate or misinterpreted citations *{{tl|Not verified}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has not been verified and may not be reliable *{{tl|Unreferenced}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has no citation or reference for its information [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[als:Vorlage:Beleg]] [[et:Mall:Lisa viide]] [[el:Πρότυπο:Εκκρεμεί παραπομπή]] [[es:Plantilla:Añadir referencias]] [[fa:نیاز به ذکر منبع]] [[fr:Modèle:Citation thích]] [[zh:Template:Fact]] [[Category:Articles needing sources]]

revision.text:
[[[Wikipedia:Citing sources |''citation needed'']]] ---- Enter this tag in the body of an article as a request for other editors to find citations: # to label a passage which is incomplete without a cited source of information # to label a quotation which lacks a citation, as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]. '''Do not use this tag in order to label text which appears doubtful or false''', especially in the case of [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biographies of living people]] (see [[Wikipedia:Three-revert_rule#Reverting_potentially_libellous_material|this section of WP:3RR]] as well). For dealing with dubious information, please use {{tl|verify source}}. See also [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Text that is, or is likely to be, disputed]]. Regarding the unsourced or poorly sourced information: # if it is likely true, but '''needs specificity,''' you may use {{tl|specify}} # if it is '''not doubtful''', you may use {{tl|fact}} or {{tl|citequote}} tag to ask for better citation in order to make the article complete. # if it is '''doubtful''' but '''not too harmful''' to the whole article, you may use {{tl|verify source}} tag to ask for source verification.
# If it is '''doubtful''' and '''(quite) highly harmful''', you may move it to the talk page and ask for a source.
# If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', you may remove it directly without the need of moving it to the talk page first. To find all the articles that use this template, please visit [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere&target=Template%3AFact What links here]. For articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles needing sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content. ==Useful redirects== * {{tl|cn}} * {{tl|Cite needed}} * {{tl|Cite-needed}} * {{tl|Citeneeded}} ==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] *''{{tl|Cite}} (deprecated)'' *{{tl|Citequote}}, tagging a request for citation, used for quotaions that needs citations to make it complete, but not for seemingly doubtful or false texts *{{tl|Request quote}}, tagging a request for quoting inaccessible source, used for requesting a direct quote from the cited source for verification *{{tl|Betterfact}}, tagging information which is cited but should be referenced to a more [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable source]]. *{{tl|Verify source}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{tl|Verify credibility}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{tl|Citecheck}}, popping up a box saying an article or section may have inappropriate or misinterpreted citations *{{tl|Not verified}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has not been verified and may not be reliable *{{tl|Unreferenced}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has no citation or reference for its information [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[als:Vorlage:Beleg]] [[et:Mall:Lisa viide]] [[el:Πρότυπο:Εκκρεμεί παραπομπή]] [[es:Plantilla:Añadir referencias]] [[fa:نیاز به ذکر منبع]] [[fr:Modèle:Citation nécessaire]] [[he:תבנית:מקור]] [[it:Template:Citazione necessaria]] [[ja:Template:要出典]] [[lv:Template:Nepieciešama atsauce]] [[nl:Sjabloon:Geenbron]] [[nn:mal:kjelde manglar]] [[no:Mal:Trenger referanse]] [[pt:Predefinição:Carece de fontes]] [[ro:Format:Necesită citare]] [[ru:Шаблон:Нет источника]] [[sr:Шаблон:Чињеница]] [[sv:Mall:Källa behövs]] [[te:Template:మూలాలు అవసరం]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Cần chú thích]] [[zh:Template:Fact]]

citare]] [[ru:Шаблон:Нет источника]] [[sr:Шаблон:Чињеница]] [[sv:Mall:Källa behövs]] [[te:Template:మూలాలు అవసరం]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Cần chú thích]] [[zh:Template:Fact]]

[[[Wikipedia:Citing sources|''citation needed'']]]{{#if: {{NAMESPACE}} | | [[Category:Articles with unsourced statements]] }} ---- Enter this tag in the body of an article as a request for other editors to find citations: # to label a passage which is incomplete without a cited source of information # to label a quotation which lacks a citation, as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]. '''Do not use this tag in order to label text which appears doubtful or false''', especially in the case of [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biographies of living people]] (see [[Wikipedia:Three-revert_rule#Reverting_potentially_libellous_material|this section of WP:3RR]] as well). For dealing with dubious information, please use {{[[Template:verify source|verify source]]}}. See also [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Text that is, or is likely to be, disputed]]. Regarding the unsourced or poorly sourced information: # if it is likely true, but '''needs specificity,''' you may use {{[[Template:specify|specify]]}} # if it is '''not doubtful''', you may use {{[[Template:fact|fact]]}} or {{[[Template:citequote|citequote]]}} tag to ask for better citation in order to make the article complete. # if it is '''doubtful''' but '''not too harmful''' to the whole article, you may use {{[[Template:verify source|verify source]]}} tag to ask for source verification.
# If it is '''doubtful''' and '''(quite) highly harmful''', you may move it to the talk page and ask for a source.
# If it is '''very doubtful''' and '''very harmful''', you may remove it directly without the need of moving it to the talk page first. To find all pages that use this template, see [[:Category:Articles with unsourced statements]]. For articles which lack sources, please visit [[:Category:Articles lacking sources]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopedic content. ==Useful redirects== * {{[[Template:cn|cn]]}} * {{[[Template:Cite needed|Cite needed]]}} * {{[[Template:Cite-needed|Cite-needed]]}} * {{[[Template:Citeneeded|Citeneeded]]}} ==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] *''{{[[Template:Cite|Cite]]}} (deprecated)'' *{{[[Template:Citequote|Citequote]]}}, tagging a request for citation, used for quotaions that needs citations to make it complete, but not for seemingly doubtful or false texts *{{[[Template:Request quote|Request quote]]}}, tagging a request for quoting inaccessible source, used for requesting a direct quote from the cited source for verification *{{[[Template:Betterfact|Betterfact]]}}, tagging information which is cited but should be referenced to a more [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable source]]. *{{[[Template:Verify source|Verify source]]}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{[[Template:Verify credibility|Verify credibility]]}}, tagging a request for source verification, used for information that is doubtful or appears false. *{{[[Template:Citecheck|Citecheck]]}}, popping up a box saying an article or section may have inappropriate or misinterpreted citations *{{[[Template:Not verified|Not verified]]}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has not been verified and may not be reliable *{{[[Template:Unreferenced|Unreferenced]]}}, popping up a box saying an article or section has no citation or reference for its information [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[als:Vorlage:Beleg]] [[et:Mall:Lisa viide]]
